commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces `.github/workflows/ci.yml` with a pull-request-only Blacksmith benchmark comparing the current git checkout against aria2c tarball extraction.

PR surface: Config -2042. Total -2042 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is an infrastructure benchmark rather than a user-facing bug report. The relevant proof is the completed Blacksmith benchmark run and its artifacts, which are now available.

target.title: Temp: benchmark checkout methods on Blacksmith
target.body:
What Problem This Solves

Measure the current custom Git checkout against aria2c tarball extraction on actual OpenClaw pull_request Blacksmith runners. Temporary benchmark PR, not intended to merge.

Why This Change Was Made

workflow_dispatch forces GitHub-hosted Ubuntu in CI, so it does not match real OpenClaw PR runner selection. This branch replaces CI with a minimal benchmark that runs on blacksmith-8vcpu-ubuntu-2404 and blacksmith-16vcpu-ubuntu-2404.

User Impact

None. Temporary measurement only.

Evidence

Pending benchmark run.
target.author: zats
